test_traj.command:
cat <<'EOF' > test_alive.ll
; Test case for alive-tv verification
target datalayout = "e-m:e-i64:64-f80:128-n8:16:32:64-S128"
target triple = "x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function that should preserve nsw flag when widening
define i32 @test_preserve_nsw(i32 %n) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp sgt i32 %n, 0
  br i1 %cmp, label %loop.preheader, label %exit

loop.preheader:
  br label %loop

loop:
  %i = phi i32 [ %i.next, %loop ], [ 0, %loop.preheader ]
  %i.next = add nsw i32 %i, 1
  %cmp2 = icmp slt i32 %i.next, %n
  br i1 %cmp2, label %loop, label %exit.loopexit

exit.loopexit:
  %i.lcssa = phi i32 [ %i.next, %loop ]
  br label %exit

exit:
  %ret = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %i.lcssa, %exit.loopexit ]
  ret i32 %ret
}

; Function that should preserve nuw flag when widening  
define i32 @test_preserve_nuw(i32 %n) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp ugt i32 %n, 0
  br i1 %cmp, label %loop.preheader, label %exit

loop.preheader:
  br label %loop

loop:
  %i = phi i32 [ %i.next, %loop ], [ 0, %loop.preheader ]
  %i.next = add nuw i32 %i, 1
  %cmp2 = icmp ult i32 %i.next, %n
  br i1 %cmp2, label %loop, label %exit.loopexit

exit.loopexit:
  %i.lcssa = phi i32 [ %i.next, %loop ]
  br label %exit

exit:
  %ret = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %i.lcssa, %exit.loopexit ]
  ret i32 %ret
}

; Function that should preserve both flags when widening
define i32 @test_preserve_both(i32 %n) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp sgt i32 %n, 0
  br i1 %cmp, label %loop.preheader, label %exit

loop.preheader:
  br label %loop

loop:
  %i = phi i32 [ %i.next, %loop ], [ 0, %loop.preheader ]
  %i.next = add nsw nuw i32 %i, 1
  %cmp2 = icmp slt i32 %i.next, %n
  br i1 %cmp2, label %loop, label %exit.loopexit

exit.loopexit:
  %i.lcssa = phi i32 [ %i.next, %loop ]
  br label %exit

exit:
  %ret = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %i.lcssa, %exit.loopexit ]
  ret i32 %ret
}
EOF

define void @test1(i32 %n) {
entry:

  br i1 %cmp, label %loop.preheader, label %exit

loop:
  %i = phi i32 [ %i.next, %loop ], [ 0, %loop.preheader ]
  call void @use(i32 %i)
  %i.next = add nsw i32 %i, 1
  %cmp2 = icmp slt i32 %i.next, %n
  br i1 %cmp2, label %loop, label %exit.loopexit

exit.loopexit:
  br label %exit

exit:
  ret void
}
